payload.title: Multifamily Residence Medium Density (MF-3) District Regulations
payload.subsectionPath: Title 25 > Ch 25-2 Zoning > Subch C > Art 3 > Div 1
payload.bodyText: Site development regulations for the MF-3 (Multifamily Residence Medium Density) district. The maximum height of a structure is 40 feet. Maximum density is governed by the site development regulations applicable to the district (36 units per acre headline per the MF district intensity standards). Floor-to-area ratio, building coverage, impervious cover, and yard setbacks are set by the site development regulations table at §25-2-491. A use or structure that exceeds the district envelope requires rezoning to a higher-intensity multifamily district or a variance granted by the Board of Adjustment.
